Document:
# Plasma Weapons
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Plasma_Weapons"]
Plasma weapons fire superheated ionized gas that deals tremendous damage against both flesh and armor. They are some of the most destructive energy weapons in the Wasteland and are rarely seen outside advanced factions.
## Plasma Pistols
Compact plasma sidearms that trade ammunition efficiency for heavy per-shot damage.
[bold]Plasma Pistol[/bold] — Standard plasma sidearm. Slow rate of fire but each bolt hits like a truck.
[bold]Plasma Defender[/bold] — Compact variant with faster handling. Favoured by officers and scouts.
## Plasma Rifles
Plasma rifles deal heavy damage at medium range and can devastate lightly armored targets on a direct hit.
[bold]Plasma Rifle[/bold] — Standard-issue plasma long arm. Devastating against flesh and armor alike.
[bold]Automatic Plasma Rifle[/bold] — Full-auto variant. Enormous damage output but chews through cells.
[bold]Urban Plasma Rifle[/bold] — Shortened barrel for close-quarters work in settlement and building fights.
## Advanced Plasma Weapons
High-end plasma technology, usually tied to advanced military stockpiles or elite factions.
[bold]Multiplas Rifle[/bold] — Fires multiple plasma bolts in a spread pattern. Devastating at close range.
[bold]Plasma Caster[/bold] — Heavy plasma weapon with extreme damage per shot. Slow but unstoppable.
## Improvised Plasma Weapons
Post-war constructed plasma weapons are rougher and less reliable, but far more obtainable than pristine military examples.
[bold]Crude Plasma Rifle[/bold] — Salvaged and rebuilt from scrap plasma components. Unreliable but functional.
